title: 解决Terraform添加CDN域名时的HTTPS配置报错-CDN-阿里云
heading_path: 添加一个加速域名 resource "alicloud_cdn_domain_new" "domain" { domain_name = "mycdndomain.alicloud-provider.cn" cdn_type = "download" scope = "overseas" sources { content = "myoss.oss-rg-china-mainland.aliyuncs.com" type = "oss" priority = "20" port = 80 weight = "15" } # 证书配置 # cert_id 需现在阿里云证书中心购买或上传证书并记录其ID # cert_type=“cas” 表示使用阿里云证书中心的证书 # cert_regin = "ap-southeast-1" 表示使用国际站的阿里云证书中心 certificate_config { cert_id = "1111111" cert_name = "cert-2987438279834" cert_type = "cas" cert_region = "ap-southeast-1" } } > 为什么选择阿里云 > 技术内容
